briefs.title: BC Securities Rules Updated: WKSI Shelf Prospectus Fees Now Have New Filing Deadlines
briefs.summary: BC updated its securities rules to add fee-filing requirements for a 'WKSI base shelf prospectus' (a fast-track fundraising document used by large, well-known public companies). Affected issuers must report and pay fees on a monthly or per-tranche basis depending on how they sell securities.
briefs.action_required: If you file a WKSI base shelf prospectus in BC, set up monthly or per-tranche fee reporting starting November 28, 2025.

key_dates.label: BC WKSI base shelf prospectus fee-filing rules take effect
